label: Transparent dew motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a dewdrop on blade motif with clear dew, leaf green grass, dawn gold reflections, and fresh morning detail, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A single curved blade of grass holding a clear dewdrop, with crisp refraction, tiny dawn highlights, natural green texture, and clean silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the blade tip or dewdrop.
Lighting/mood: soft morning light, fresh onboarding-system mood, clean transparent highlights.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no insects, no meadow background, no multiple subjects, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Dew" derived from the visible transparent dewdrop on blade motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from clear dew, leaf green, dawn gold, wet grass texture, and droplet geometry. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Dew, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, onboarding metric cards, progress charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, droplet focus rings, fresh step-by-step onboarding mood.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Dew".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Dew design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent dewdrop on blade motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve clear dew highlights, leaf green progress states, dawn gold warmth, droplet texture, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Dew, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: wet leaf background, morning-white text, leaf green primary accents, clear dew secondary highlights, dawn gold focus states, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
